title: Energy Secretary Wright says U.S. 'not ready' to escort oil tankers through Strait of Hormuz yet
summary_full: Tanker traffic through the strait remains at a standstill as ship owners fear attacks by Iran. The closure has triggered the largest oil supply disruption ever.
summary_public: Tanker traffic through the strait remains at a standstill as ship owners fear attacks by Iran. The closure has triggered the largest oil supply disruption ever.
